use_cases: Call-to-action button with animated cursor-tracked gradient circles for engaging user interactions
Interactive decorative button element for landing pages or feature showcases
Visual feedback component that responds to pointer movement with fading circle animations
ai_summary: Serafimcloud HoverButton is an interactive input component that creates animated gradient circles following the cursor position when hovering. The button features dynamic color transitions using CSS custom properties and triggers a sequence of fading circle effects. Ideal for creating engaging CTAs or decorative interactive elements in modern web applications.
